sub_pixel_system.notes: Puzzle game with grid-based cookie matching; no documented sub-pixel movement system

special_mechanics.name: Cursor Grid Rotation
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a cursor on a rectangular grid that rotates individual lines of cookies (similar to Rubik's Cube mechanics). No traditional character movement physics apply.

special_mechanics.name: Cookie Matching System
special_mechanics.description: Rows or columns consisting entirely of matching cookies are cleared from the grid. Grid grows as cookies enter from top and right sides. Game over occurs on overflow.

special_mechanics.name: Wild Card Cookie
special_mechanics.description: Yoshi head-shaped cookie acts as wild card to clear lines of any other cookie type.

tier_notes: Tier 3: Puzzle game with no traditional character movement, gravity, or jump physics. Physics parameters not applicable. Game features grid-based cursor manipulation for cookie rotation and matching. Sources document development history, game modes, and regional differences but contain no movement-related physics data.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Yoshi's Cookie (NES)
